post.content: ```\nInput is 7 distinct letters and output all possible combinations of the letters based on the below condition. Words should be at least four letters. One character will be mandatory. e.g. I/TWADLN is input, where I is mandatory. Examples: WAIT: yes LIT: no, too short WANT: no, does not contain mandatory letter ITWA: Yes FISH: no, contains letters not in the setQuestions INITIAL Generate all possible words

Backtracking push all 3-6 letter combinations on to set.(except mandatory one)\nThen add mandatory letter to make combination at each location of the string to form a unique character. \nPushing the result onto set, will keep the elements unique.
Is it assumed that each character occurs at most 1 time in the word? \'IIII\' is illegal?\nDoes the word have to have a length of exactly 4 or at least 4?
O(N!)\n\nAdd the mandatory word to the string and generate permutations for all words == 4 and mandatory character in set
